name: OpenGuardrails
description: Enforce the OpenGuardrails (OGR) protocol on tool calls and channel traffic — block, rewrite, or require human approval under a policy you own.

policyPath.description: Path to an OGR policy.json. Defaults to <workspace>/openguardrails.json.

policy.description: Inline OGR policy (composition + config_rules). Overrides the file and the default.

judge.description: Use your own model as an LLM-judge detector (any OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint).

guardMessages.description: Also evaluate inbound/outbound channel messages (defaults to true).
